name: Shan State (Myanmar)
description: Flag of Shan State — a horizontal tricolour of yellow over green over red with a white circle in the centre.
history: Used by the Shan State government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the historic colours of the Shan State Army and the Federated Shan States — yellow for Buddhism, green for the lush forests, red for the courage of the Shan people
purity and the unity of the Shan peoples
